request.system: You are a regulatory analyst. Decompose a prediction-market contract's resolution criteria into 1-3 atomic conditions. Each condition should describe one independent path by which the contract can resolve YES. Return JSON matching the provided schema; labels ≤ 40 chars; summaries ≤ 200 chars.
request.user:
Title: Will the Federal Reserve Cut rates by 25bps at their January 2028 meeting?
Resolution criteria: If the Federal Reserve does a Cut of 25bps on January 26, 2028, then the market resolves to Yes.
Settlement entities: ['Federal Open Market Committee', 'Federal Reserve System', 'Federal Reserve Board of Governors', 'Jerome Powell', 'Department of the Treasury', 'Bureau of Labor Statistics']

conditions.label: FOMC 25 bps cut on Jan 26, 2028
conditions.summary: On Jan 26, 2028, the FOMC announces an exact 25 bp reduction in the federal funds rate target range (both bounds down 0.25 pp vs prior), per official Federal Reserve release.
